Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests and protect your family from aggressive stinging insects.

localContext: Bellmore's mature trees and well-maintained homes provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, particularly during late summer months. faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Bellmore?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Bellmore. Our technicians understand that hornets pose an immediate threat, especially to families with children or anyone with allergies, so we prioritize emergency calls and typically arrive within hours of your initial contact.

faqs.question: What does the $350 – $550 hornet removal price include?
faqs.answer: Our hornet removal service includes a thorough property inspection, complete nest elimination using professional-grade equipment, safe disposal of the nest, treatment of the surrounding area to prevent re-infestation, and a follow-up guarantee. The final price depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets in Bellmore?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and proven techniques that effectively eliminate hornets while prioritizing the safety of your family, pets, and property. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during treatment, and we provide clear instructions for re-entry after the service is complete.

faqs.question: Do you handle hornets in difficult-to-reach locations like high trees or attics?
faqs.answer: Yes, our Bellmore team is fully equipped to remove hornet nests from challenging locations including tall trees, under eaves, inside wall voids, attics, and sheds. We have specialized ladders, protective equipment, and extraction tools to safely access and eliminate nests regardless of their location on your property.
